context: Tests whether the agent preserves RelevanceKit's boundary while routing adjacent widget, health, and location implementation work to sibling skills.

checklist.name: RelevanceKit scope
checklist.description: Keeps RelevanceKit skill scope to watchOS Smart Stack relevance clues, `RelevantContext`, provider `relevance()`, `RelevantIntentManager`, and the relevant-widget workflow, including WidgetKit APIs such as `RelevanceConfiguration` and `RelevanceEntriesProvider` when used specifically for relevant widgets.

checklist.name: WidgetKit routing
checklist.description: Routes general iOS Home Screen widget timelines, refresh budgets, widget families, controls, Live Activities, and APNs widget push updates to WidgetKit guidance.

checklist.name: HealthKit routing
checklist.description: Routes workout recording, `HKWorkoutSession`, workout routes, and broader HealthKit authorization/query work to HealthKit guidance.

checklist.name: MapKit routing
checklist.description: Routes place search, autocomplete, directions, and broader CoreLocation flows to MapKit/CoreLocation guidance.

checklist.name: Handoff points
checklist.description: Preserves handoff points, such as using MapKit point-of-interest categories only as input to `RelevantContext.location(category:)` and HealthKit permissions only as prerequisites for fitness/sleep clues.

checklist.name: No sibling overreach
checklist.description: Does not expand RelevanceKit into full WidgetKit, HealthKit, or MapKit implementation details.
